title: RAULOPOLY
subtitle: THE GALACTIC CHAOS MONOPOLY
tutorialDesc: Your goal is to become the richest player while navigating a chaotic galactic board. Buy properties, collect rent, and survive the chaos!
rulesText: The board has 40 squares: properties, stations, utilities, taxes, and chaos/power cards.
If you land on an unowned property you can buy it; otherwise you pay rent.
Rent doubles when the owner has the full color monopoly.
Reaching $0 turns you into a ghost: you can't buy but can still collect from others.
CHAOS and POWER cards trigger special effects (check the game screen for details).
The chaos die (30% chance) can activate a third special die.
The last player with money remaining wins the game.

features.title: 🔀 Teleporters
features.desc: The board moves you where you don't want

features.title: 🦹 Quantum Theft
features.desc: You can steal money and properties from others

go.name: GO
go.desc: Collect $200 when you pass. The start of your galactic journey.

property.name: PROPERTY
property.desc: Buy to corner a color or pay rent. With monopoly, rent doubles.

railroad.name: STATION
railroad.desc: Space transport. Rent doubles with each extra station.

utility.name: UTILITY
utility.desc: Cosmic resources. Rent = (dice × 4) or (dice × 10) if you own both.

tax.name: TAX
tax.desc: You pay the bank. Your money goes to the Galactic Jackpot.

jail.name: JAIL/VISIT
jail.desc: Mandatory 3-turn stay. Or pay $50 to leave, or roll doubles.

freeparking.name: JACKPOT
freeparking.desc: Fortune! Collect ALL accumulated wealth from taxes and chaos squares.

chance.name: POWER OF CHAOS
chance.desc: Random beneficial effect: movement, money, or magical cards.

chest.name: CHAOS BOX
chest.desc: Extreme random effect: can bankrupt or save you. Chaos reigns!

gotojail.name: TELEPORTER
gotojail.desc: Sends you straight to JAIL without collecting $200.
